testcase.name: test_ai_chat_hvac_diagnosis
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase5.py:66: in test_ai_chat_hvac_diagnosis assert r.status_code == 200, f"{r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: 500 {"detail":"AI error: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.002122, Max budget: 0.001"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_ai_chat_multi_turn_session
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase5.py:82: in test_ai_chat_multi_turn_session assert r1.status_code == 200, r1.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"AI error: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.002122, Max budget: 0.001"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
